calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kim Marois for and with Kurt Swainston, Petitioner/Executor (via Zoom).

Ms. Marois and Mr. Swainston requested an extension for the next accounting period through December 2028. The court expressed concern about being out of touch for such a lengthy period and questioned whether the IRS would take action before then.

Counsel noted that the matter is entirely within the IRS's discretion, and there is no process to expedite a resolution. The court proposed the next accounting period cover January 2024 through December 2026. Counsel agreed to this timeline and suggested filing the next accounting in May 2027 to accommodate tax season.

The court allowed estate administration to continue to May 25, 2027, and took the matter under submission with intent to grant as to account #3 for 2023. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration was set for May 25, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Future Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-26-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kim Marois appeared by zoom for executor.

Mrs. Marois explained circumstances, time spent, services provided and the complexity of the case to support the request for fees and compensation to the firm and to the executor for work that was done in connection with the foriegn tax reporting issue for the foreign bank account. Mrs. Marois also asked the court allow administration of the estate until April of 2028. The Second Account and Status Report of Executor, and Petition for Order Settling Second Account is under submission. Future accounting is set for November 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 29, 2019 is admitted to probate. Kurt C. Swainston is appointed Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is fixed at $17,750,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 31, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
